summary: Frontend-only testing of season switching functionality completed successfully. Verified that switching between existing seasons (2025, 2026, 2027) works correctly without prompting to create a new season.

season_switching_2025_to_2026.result: Season switched successfully. Sidebar updated from 'Season 2025' to 'Season 2026'. Toast 'Season activated' displayed. No 'create new season' dialog appeared.

season_switching_2026_to_2027.result: Season switched successfully. Sidebar updated from 'Season 2026' to 'Season 2027'. Toast 'Season activated' displayed. No 'create new season' dialog appeared.

season_switching_2027_to_2025.result: Season switched successfully. Sidebar updated from 'Season 2027' to 'Season 2025'. Toast 'Season activated' displayed. No 'create new season' dialog appeared.

sidebar_year_update.result: Sidebar nav item correctly updates to show the active season year (e.g., 'Season 2025', 'Season 2026', 'Season 2027')

dashboard_stats_update.result: Dashboard correctly shows stats for active season. Total Birds: 13 (global, not season-filtered). Active Pairs: 0 (for seasons with no pairs). Quick Stats: Total Pairs 0, Total Clutches 0 for empty seasons.

no_create_season_prompt.result: No dialog/prompt appeared asking to create a new season when switching between existing seasons 2025, 2026, 2027. The bug reported by user has been fixed.

ui_verification.seasons_page: All 3 seasons (2027, 2026, 2025) displayed correctly with Activate buttons on non-active seasons and ACTIVE badge on active season
ui_verification.activate_button: Clicking 'Activate' on any non-active season immediately activates it without prompts
ui_verification.toast_notification: 'Season activated' toast displayed after each switch
ui_verification.sidebar_navigation: Sidebar shows correct active season year, updates immediately after switch
ui_verification.dashboard: Stats correctly reflect active season data (birds global, pairs/clutches filtered by season)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Season switching functionality is working correctly. The reported bug (being asked to create new season when switching) does not reproduce. Implementation uses handleActivate() in Seasons.jsx which calls seasonsApi.activate() and dispatches 'seasonChanged' event to update Layout sidebar. Backend /api/seasons/{id}/activate endpoint correctly deactivates all seasons then activates the selected one.

bug_verification.reported_bug: When in season 2026 and trying to change to 2025 or 2027, application asks to create new season instead of loading existing data
bug_verification.verification_result: BUG NOT REPRODUCED - Season switching works correctly without any dialog/prompt to create new season
bug_verification.possible_explanation: The bug may have been fixed in a previous iteration or was a transient issue. Current implementation in handleActivate() (line 128 Seasons.jsx) correctly calls the activate API without any conditional checks that would show a create dialog.
